positive: A cozy, storybook watercolor illustration of a picnic setup in a sun-dappled meadow. A small group of woodland animals (fox, rabbit, badger) are gathered around a basket filled with berries and bread. The style should be soft, warm, and nostalgic, with a pastel color palette and visible brushstrokes.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
